name: Ancient Apparition
description: Kaldr, the Ancient Apparition, is an image projected from outside time. He brings all matter to a stop with his grip of ice.

abilities.name: Bone Chill
abilities.description: Applies a movement speed slow debuff to all enemy units affected by Kaldr's abilities. Additionally reduces the debuff-affected enemy hero's.

abilities.name: Cold Feet
abilities.description: The upgrade applies all ability effects to enemy units within the radius around both unit-targeted enemies.

abilities.name: Ice Vortex
abilities.description: Applies a movement speed slow and magic resistance reduction to enemy units within its radius. Grants flying vision centered around the effect radius.

abilities.name: Chilling Touch
abilities.description: Enhances Kaldr's attack with increased attack range, heavy magic damage, and movement speed slow.

abilities.name: Ice Blast
abilities.description: Enemy units caught in the explosion, or came in contact of the ice projectile as it travels, take damage over time with heal and health regeneration sources no longer working for them. If an enemy hero's current health drops below a certain threshold, they instantly shatter. Applies of 's corresponding ability level when acquired.
